code: import React,{useState}from'react';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function ViewCart(_ref){let{closeCart,itemsInCart,cart,calculateTotal}=_ref;const[promoCode,setPromoCode]=useState("");const[discount,setDiscount]=useState(0);const[error,setError]=useState("");const applyPromoCode=()=>{if(promoCode==="SAVE50"){setDiscount(0.5);setError("");}else{setError("Invalid promo code.");}};const total=calculateTotal();const discountedTotal=total-total*discount;const discountMade=total*discount;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"view_cart",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"cart_content",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{className:"items_in_cart",children:"Items in Cart"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:["Items in Cart: ",itemsInCart]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"cart_items",children:cart.length===0?/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:"Your cart is empty"}):cart.map((item,index)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"cart_item",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:[item.name,": $",item.price]})},item.id))}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"promo_code",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"text",placeholder:"Enter SAVE50 for 50% off",value:promoCode,onChange:e=>setPromoCode(e.target.value)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:applyPromoCode,children:"Apply"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:error})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:["Discount: -$",discountMade.toFixed(2)]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:["Total: $",discountedTotal.toFixed(2)]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:closeCart,children:"Close"})]})});}
